Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &ProTipDef = nullvalue(&ProTipDef) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'RowswcItensTelevendas', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &GridRows.FromString(&PadObs) If Not &GridRows.IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridRows GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = &GridRows Else Grid.Rows = 50 EndIf &EmpCod = &InEmpCod &FilCod = &InFilCod &PedCod = &InPedCod if &ProdutoServico = 'SERVICO' &ProTipDef = Definicao.SERVICO Else &ProTipDef = Definicao.OUTRAS Endif do 'servicoProduto' if &FilterFullText.IsEmpty() tableMain.Visible = 0 Endif For each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod prcRetornaTipoComissao.Call(EmpCod, PedVenCod, &PesTipCom) &UserComissao.Visible = (&PesTipCom = 'D') //comissao desconto Exit EndFor //Realizar a Validação\\ RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon003_AvisarEstoque, &AlertarProdutoSemEstoque) //####################\\ EndEvent Event Refresh do 'servicoProduto' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridRows = Grid.Rows If &GridRows > 1 PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'RowswcItensTelevendas', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, Trim(ToFormattedString(&GridRows)), &PadDtaMod) EndIf EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load tableMain.Visible = 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &actioUpda = !'' &SolicitarDescontos = !'' &EliminarItem = !'' &UserComissao = !'' &QuantidadeFormatada6 = PedQtd &PedQtdVarchar = trim(toformattedString(&QuantidadeFormatada6)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&PedQtdVarchar, &PedQtdVarchar) &PedVlrUntVarchar = trim(toformattedString(PedVlrUnt)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaDuasCasas.Call(&PedVlrUntVarchar, &PedVlrUntVarchar) &PedItmDscVarchar = trim(toformattedString(PedItmDsc)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&PedItmDscVarchar, &PedItmDscVarchar) &PedVlrUntDscVarchar = trim(toformattedString(PedVlrUntComDsc)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaDuasCasas.Call(&PedVlrUntDscVarchar, &PedVlrUntDscVarchar) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do case Case PedItmPrm = domPedItmPrm.PROMOCAO PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) //vermelho PedVlrItm.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Case PedItmPrm = domPedItmPrm.DESCONTO PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) PedVlrItm.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Case PedVlrUnt < PedVlrTab PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) PedVlrItm.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Case PedVlrUnt > PedVlrTab PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(0,80,200)//azul PedVlrItm.ForeColor = RGB(0,80,200) Otherwise PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) PedVlrItm.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndCase PedProNom.Link = VerProduto.Link('DashBoard', EmpCod, ProCod) PedProNom.LinkTarget = '_blank' &Mecanico = '' If PedItmVenCod > 0 RetornaNomeFuncionario.Call(EmpCod, PedItmVenCod, &PesIsFun, &PesRaz) &Mecanico = trim(str(PedItmVenCod)) + ' - ' + trim(&PesRaz) EndIF // ######## Realizar a Validação Estoque RetornaEstoquePedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &PedSts, '', &EstQtd, &EstSdo, '') Do case Case (PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO OR PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) &newEstQtd = &EstQtd + PedQtd Case LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria //ele baixa o saldo, e soma o proprio pedido pra nao ficar mais negativo ainda. &newEstQtd = &EstSdo + PedQtd OtherWise // cai aqui quando por exemplo é orçamento de venda, que dai não baixa o saldo. &newEstQtd = &EstSdo EndCase Do Case Case &AlertarProdutoSemEstoque = 'S' and ProEstTip <> TipoEstoque.NAO_ATUALIZA &PedQtdVarchar.ColumnClass = IIF(PedQtd > &newEstQtd, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoSingleCell') Grid.HoveringColor = RGB(&hR, &hG, &hB) Grid.SelectionColor = RGB(&sR, &sG, &sB) OtherWise &PedQtdVarchar.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndCase //####################\\ EndEvent Event &EliminarItem.Click &PedSts = PedSts DVelop_ConfirmPanel_EliminarItem.ConfirmationText = 'Deseja mesmo Eliminar o Produto '+ProGraRef+' do Pedido?' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &FilCod_Selected = FilCod &PedCod_Selected = PedCod &PedItmCod_Selected = PedItmCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_EliminarItem.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_EliminarItem.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_EliminarItem.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do EliminarItem' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserComissao.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserComissao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserComissao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcComissionamento.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, ProGraRef) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EliminarItem' If &PedItmCod_Selected <> 0 and (&PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO OR &PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) DeletaItemPedidoCompra.Call(&EmpCod_Selected, &FilCod_Selected, &PedCod_Selected, &PedItmCod_Selected) tableMain.Visible = 0 &FilterFullText = '' grid.Refresh() Msg('Produto eliminado com sucesso!') Else msg('Pedido com status diferente de ABERTO ou SEPARANDO não é possível remover item!') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTERFULLTEXT" &FilterFullText.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"EMPCOD" &EmpCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROTIPDEF" &ProTipDef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTERFULLTEXT", "", not &FilterFullText.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilterFullText, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"EMPCOD", "", not &EmpCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &EmpCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROTIPDEF", "", not &ProTipDef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProTipDef, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"PedidoProduto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &SolicitarDescontos.Click wpSolicitaAutorizacao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &PedCliCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, PedQtd, PedVlrUnt, PedItmDsc) Refresh EndEvent Event &actioUpda.Click wpPedidoVendaItem.Link(&DeOndeVem, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod) EndEvent Sub 'servicoProduto' if &ProdutoServico = 'SERVICO' PedProNom.Title = 'Descrição do Serviço' ProCod.Title = 'Serviço' MarNom.Visible = 0 PedVlrUnt.Visible = 0 PedItmDsc.Visible = 0 Else PedProNom.Title = 'Descrição do Produto' ProCod.Title = 'Produto' &Mecanico.Visible = 0 EndIF EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
